name: tapcontroller
description: Turn your phone into a game controller for PC

scripts.prebuild: powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name TapController -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.postinstall: echo Install complete. Run 'pip install vgamepad' if not done already. ViGEmBus installer is bundled at tools/drivers/ViGEmBus_1.22.0_x64_x86_arm64.exe.
